name: research-roundtable
stop_condition: Stop after max_rounds and produce a final synthesis; do not infer automatic consensus.

turns.name: landscape
turns.instruction: Build the strongest factual landscape for the requested topic. Separate confirmed facts, assumptions, and open questions.

turns.name: critique
turns.instruction: Critique the landscape. Focus on weak evidence, hidden assumptions, missing alternatives, and enterprise or operational risks. Put only the substantive critique inside the configured roundtable-output markers.

turns.name: revised-synthesis
turns.instruction: Reconcile the research and critique into a revised synthesis. Preserve unresolved disagreements explicitly.

final.name: final-synthesis
final.instruction: Produce the final Markdown document for the user. Include Agreement, Disagreement or Uncertainty, Final Recommendation, and Next Actions.
